Class BaitZoneService

java.lang.Object
net.sylphian.minecraft.fishing.services.BaitZoneService
public class BaitZoneService extends Object
Manages bait configurations and active bait zones.

Owns the loaded bait config map (mirroring how LootService owns the fish pool) so no other class needs to hold or reload it separately.

  • Constructor Details

    • BaitZoneService

      public BaitZoneService(Map<String, BaitConfig> baits)
      Constructs a new BaitZoneService.
      Parameters:
      baits - the initial map of bait configurations loaded from baits.yml

  • Method Details

    • start

      public void start(org.bukkit.plugin.java.JavaPlugin plugin)
      Starts the rendering and label update tasks.
      Parameters:
      plugin - the plugin instance for scheduling

    • shutdown

      public void shutdown()
      Cancels all tasks and removes all active zones and their display entities.

    • reload

      public void reload(Map<String, BaitConfig> baits)
      Reloads the bait configuration map. Active zones are unaffected — they continue with the config they were created with.
      Parameters:
      baits - the updated bait configurations

    • getBaitConfig

      @Nullable public BaitConfig getBaitConfig(String id)
      Returns the config for the given bait ID, or null if not found.
      Parameters:
      id - the bait identifier
      Returns:
      the BaitConfig, or null

    • createZone

      public void createZone(org.bukkit.Location centre, BaitConfig config)
      Creates a new bait zone centred at the given location.
      Parameters:
      centre - the water surface location the bait landed at
      config - the bait configuration for this zone

    • getZonesAt

      public List<BaitZone> getZonesAt(org.bukkit.Location location)
      Returns at most one active zone per bait type whose radius contains the given location. If multiple zones of the same type overlap, only the first (oldest) is included.
      Parameters:
      location - the location to check
      Returns:
      a list of matching BaitZones with no duplicate bait types, empty if none

    • getBaitIds

      public Collection<String> getBaitIds()
      Returns all registered bait IDs.
      Returns:
      the collection of bait identifiers currently loaded from baits.yml
